title: Murge's Mjolnir Mace
description: A Resource Pack which replaces Minecraft’s mace with Thor’s Hammer.
body:
## Preview
![Mjolnir Handheld POV](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1a1a17dad28350ce79342240ea6e322e9c78acd_0.webp)

## Showcase Video
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/xIrSVI-vMLU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Pack Summary:
A Resource Pack that redesigns Minecraft's Mace, and replaces it with a stylistic textured 3D model resembling Thor's hammer (Mjolnir).
### What content is in this Resource Pack?
- A customised 3D model of a cartoon styled Mjolnir.
- A custom language file adjustment to replace the name of the item from "Mace" to "Mjolnir". (Adjusted lang files: 'en_us.json', and 'en_au.json')
### What is the purpose of this Pack?
I designed this Resource Pack to improve the aesthetic of a new and interesting item newly added to the game, at the time of the pack's creation. I primarily created it for PvP though, with a strong interest in using it myself while playing against different players.
### Does this Resource Pack require any mods?
No mods are required at all. I have personally tested the compatibility of this pack with and without many different mods, and even with the unmodded default Minecraft launcher, and it was not affected at all. 
### Why should you download this Pack?
I created this pack because I thought it was aesthetically pleasing, and that the original mace design was a bit bland and boring, but that may be different for other browsing viewers. In the event that you do enjoy my redesign, feel free to download it, and use it as much as you please.
